text: Opt-in syntax modules shipped: gale.syntax.all (pointwise */ /map, zipMap = PRD explicit-elementwise) and gale.syntax.unicode (x cross product, dot). PRD example-conformance suite (userland.SyntaxConformanceSuite) runs the PRD §614-629 examples verbatim: pointwise is Hadamard (not the matrix product), unicode ops are exact synonyms, shape mismatch throws DimensionMismatch (arithmetic-primitive convention, not Either tier), and the 'all' wildcard stays free of the unicode operators. Namespace: PRD sketches gale.linalg.syntax; exposed at sibling top-level gale.syntax (documented, equivalent). Green: coreJVM 341, coreJS 338.
